---
title: "API usage"
---

## Overview

The project includes a FastAPI application that exposes topic inference for new manifesto-like text inputs.

This makes the trained topic model accessible to users who do not need to run the full training pipeline.

## Run locally

```bash
uv run uvicorn app.api:app --reload
``` 

Documentation
Local Swagger UI: http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
Deployed Swagger UI: https://manifesto-api-sny.lab.sspcloud.fr/docs

Example request

```bash
curl -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:8000/predict_topics" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"text": "Nous voulons défendre la justice sociale."}'

```

Example response
Add here a real JSON response captured from the API, for example:

```bash
{
  "processed_text": "vouloir défendre justice social service public",
  "top_topic_id": 4,
  "top_topic_label": "français_national_liberté",
  "top_topic_score": 0.8539606046385947,
  "topic_distribution": [
    0.020875688261488397,
    0.02086718061520562,
    0.020850240568247337,
    0.02087238559487796,
    0.8539606046385947,
    0.020851844617826007,
    0.02085487065904547,
    0.020867185044714447
  ]
}

```

Typical usage
The API can be used to:
    * test new manifesto excerpts
    * inspect topic probabilities
    * integrate the model into other applications
    * demonstrate the deployed inference layer
